TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Michel_Temer, title = Michel_Temer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Michel_Temer} }

S.FORM: Michel Temer Misiel Taymil I 1940 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Misiel Taymil(Michel Temer), malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Brazil anini i ci Michel Temer, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 31 a romi'ad. misaparod 家庭 O kahofocan ni Michel Temer iti i Tietê no Seng PawLo, o fa'inayan a wawa ni Nakhoul "Miguel" Elias Temer Lulia ato ci March Barbar Lulia, 1925 a miheca malinah ko Maloni a tinsokiw no Lipanen a tayra to i Pasi . lalamod 配偶 Ci Michel Temer atoya sa'ayaway a fafahi ci Maria Célia Toledo i, tatoloay ko fafahiyan a wawa nangra, Luciana (1969),Maristela (1972) ato Clarissa (1974).Saka tosa a fafahi ci Masera Teterseci , cecay ko fainayan wawa ci Eduardo itini i Longtong a hofocen. 2002 a miheca masaso'araw cangra itini i kasaopoan no kayki, maangoha cangra, kaka ni Misel to sepat polo ira ko tolo a mihecaan ci Maseraan, itini to 2003 a miheca saka pito folad 26 a romi'ad pataloma' cangra. polong ko laloma'an nangra i lalimaay ko tamdaw. mamikowan 政治生涯 pitooran 信仰
S.PHON: miʦħəɾ təmər misiəɾ tajmiɾ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi misiəɾ tajmiɾ(miʦħəɾ təmər), maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u b~b~vra*iɾ anini i ʦi miʦħəɾ təmər, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. misaparo~uɬ~ɮ ** o~u kaħo~ufo~uʦan ni miʦħəɾ təmər iti i tiət* no~u səŋ pawɾo~u, o~u faʡinajan a wawa ni nakħo~uo~u~uɾ "mi*o~u~uəɾ" əɾias təmər ɾo~u~uɾia ato~u ʦi marʦħ b~b~varb~b~var ɾo~u~uɾia, **** a miħəʦa maɾinaħ ko~u maɾo~uni a tinso~ukiw no~u ɾipanən a tajra to~u i pasi . ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** ʦi miʦħəɾ təmər ato~uja saʡajawaj a fafaħi ʦi maria ʦ*ɾia to~uɾəɬ~ɮo~u i, tato~uɾo~uaj ko~u fafaħijan a wawa naŋra, ɾo~u~uʦiana (****),maristəɾa (****) ato~u ʦɾarissa (****).saka to~usa a fafaħi ʦi masəra tətərsəʦi , ʦəʦaj ko~u fainajan wawa ʦi əɬ~ɮo~u~uarɬ~ɮo~u itini i ɾo~uŋto~uŋ a ħo~ufo~uʦən. **** a miħəʦa masaso~uʡaraw ʦaŋra itini i kasao~upo~uan no~u kajki, maaŋo~uħa ʦaŋra, kaka ni misəɾ to~u səpat po~uɾo~u ira ko~u to~uɾo~u a miħəʦaan ʦi masəraan, itini to~u **** a miħəʦa saka pito~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ pataɾo~umaʡ ʦaŋra. po~uɾo~uŋ ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan naŋra i ɾaɾimaaj ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. mamiko~uwan **** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: Michel Temer Misiel Taymil I 1940 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 23 a romi'ad masofoc ci Misiel Taymil(Michel Temer), malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Brazil anini i ci Michel Temer, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 8 folad saka 31 a romi'ad. misaparod 家庭 O kahofocan ni Michel Temer iti i Tietê no Seng PawLo, o fa'inayan a wawa ni Nakhoul "Miguel" Elias Temer Lulia ato ci March Barbar Lulia, 1925 a miheca malinah ko Maloni a tinsokiw no Lipanen a tayra to i Pasi . lalamod 配偶 Ci Michel Temer atoya sa'ayaway a fafahi ci Maria Célia Toledo i, tatoloay ko fafahiyan a wawa nangra, Luciana (1969),Maristela (1972) ato Clarissa (1974).Saka tosa a fafahi ci Masera Teterseci , cecay ko fainayan wawa ci Eduardo itini i Longtong a hofocen. 2002 a miheca masaso'araw cangra itini i kasaopoan no kayki, maangoha cangra, kaka ni Misel to sepat polo ira ko tolo a mihecaan ci Maseraan, itini to 2003 a miheca saka pito folad 26 a romi'ad pataloma' cangra. polong ko laloma'an nangra i lalimaay ko tamdaw. mamikowan 政治生涯 pitooran 信仰
